creator: rfg@tristatelogic.com
text:
While updating my ports collection, I have encounteded the exact same problem
as described both here:

http://lists.freebsd.org/pipermail/freebsd-ports/2013-October/087058.html

ands also here:

http://comments.gmane.org/gmane.os.freebsd.devel.ports/114472

I implemented the same work-around as described in the link just above.

The maintainer obviously needs to implement a port dependency of
multimedia/rtmpdump upon multimedia/librtmp.

Fix: 

Add a new port dependency, as mentioned above.
How-To-Repeat: 
Just try to update the *current* multimedia/rtmpdump port BEFORE separately
and manually installing the new multimedia/librtmp port.
